title: Modled
description: It’s a multiplayer-focused modpack that combines technology and exploration for an immersive experience. Build advanced machinery, explore new biomes, and embark on thrilling adventures together!
body:
Modled is the ultimate multiplayer Minecraft modpack, designed to bring players together in a world of technological innovation and thrilling exploration. Dive into a rich, immersive experience where you can build advanced machinery, automate tasks, and harness the power of cutting-edge technology. Venture into uncharted biomes, uncover hidden treasures, and embark on epic adventures with friends. Whether you’re a seasoned engineer or an intrepid explorer, Modled offers endless possibilities for collaborative gameplay and unforgettable moments. Join the community and start your adventure today!



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Aquaculture 2 is a mod made by [Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/members/shadow/projects) on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

Cosmetic Armor Reworked is a mod made by [LainMI](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lainmi/projects) on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

DisenchantingForge is a mod made by [chirptheboy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/chirptheboy/projects) on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/disenchantingforge)

Create Recycle Everything is a mod made by [nocubeyt](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nocubeyt/projects) on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything)

</details>
